requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter) — Bulgaria / ESO
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）——保加利亚 / ESO
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）——保加利亞 / ESO

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to Bulgarian grids must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), which specify requirements for generating plants connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. At the EU level, Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above the thresholds defined by each member state. In Bulgaria, the Electricity System Operator (ESO — Електроенергиен Системен Оператор) administers national grid codes; large-scale BESS projects may also require coordination with the Energy and Water Regulatory Commission (EWRC / КЕВР). The Bulgarian grid operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz for low-voltage connections.
summary.zh: 接入保加利亚电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准，规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。欧盟层面，欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过各成员国规定阈值的发电模块设定了具有约束力的要求。在保加利亚，国家电网规程由保加利亚电力系统运营商（ESO）管理；大型BESS项目还可能需要与能源和水资源监管委员会（EWRC/КЕВР）协调。保加利亚低压连接电网为230/400 V、50 Hz。
summary.zht: 接入保加利亞電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準，規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。歐盟層面，歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過各成員國規定閾值的發電模組設定了具有約束力的要求。在保加利亞，國家電網規程由保加利亞電力系統運營商（ESO）管理；大型BESS項目還可能需要與能源和水資源監管委員會（EWRC/КЕВР）協調。保加利亞低壓連接電網為230/400 V、50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: Bulgaria Electricity System Operator (ESO) national grid connection rules
EWRC (Energy and Water Regulatory Commission) sector regulations

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 for EU/Bulgarian market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory, and must satisfy the applicable national grid code in Bulgaria as administered by ESO. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law in Bulgaria; Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被欧盟/保加利亚市场认可为EN 50549-1/-2的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足保加利亚ESO管理的国家电网规程。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631在保加利亚具有直接法律效力，依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括电压/频率穿越曲线不同、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重新并网延迟设置不同，以及通信协议要求不同。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被歐盟/保加利亞市場認可為EN 50549-1/-2的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足保加利亞ESO管理的國家電網規程。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631在保加利亞具有直接法律效力，依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重新並網延遲設置不同，以及通訊協定要求不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive and relevant national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law in Bulgaria. ESO national grid codes are mandatory for grid connection approval.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Bulgarian/EU grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and the applicable ESO national grid code is required before connecting to the Bulgarian grid. Engage an accredited EU test laboratory early in the product development cycle.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合保加利亚/欧盟并网要求。在接入保加利亚电网之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及适用ESO国家电网规程的完整重新测试。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟检测实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合保加利亞/歐盟並網要求。在接入保加利亞電網之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及適用ESO國家電網規程的完整重新測試。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟檢測實驗室。
